# tf_publish_registry

*This page will be auto-generated by stardoc.*

Publish modules to Terraform Registry (HCP/TFE).

```starlark
load("@rules_tf2//tf2:def.bzl", "tf_publish_registry")

tf_publish_registry(
    name = "publish",
    module = ":my_module",
    organization = "my-org",
    module_name = "my-terraform-module",
    provider = "aws",
    # namespace = "my-namespace",  # optional, defaults to organization
)
```

See [Publishing Overview](README.md) for more information.
